corpus_policy.pruning_summary: Imported full export and Telegram API comments, then pruned all posts before 2025 after confirming preserved links were cross-channel/legacy noise rather than required runtime context.

routing_notes: Strong fit for Claude Code orchestration, agent security, OpenClaw/Radius risk analysis, token optimization, and vibecoding practice.
Use as a precision source for practical local-agent security and Claude-centric workflows.
Do not route as a broad enterprise governance, foundational ML, local-LLM infra, or generic AI-news expert.
Filter promotional Vibecon/course material unless the user asks about learning paths or adoption.
recommended_manifest_caveat: accepted for Claude Code orchestration, local-agent security, OpenClaw/Radius risk analysis, token optimization, and vibecoding practitioner depth; overlap-heavy with existing coding-agent experts, so route as a precision source rather than a generic AI-assisted development voice
